content: Tailwind CSS 4 responsive grids: use grid + grid-cols-1 (mobile default) + md:grid-cols-2 (tablet) + lg:grid-cols-3 (desktop). Gap utilities: gap-4 (1rem), gap-6 (1.5rem), gap-8 (2rem). Breakpoints: sm=640px, md=768px, lg=1024px, xl=1280px. For 2x3 feature grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with gap-6. Mobile-first approach: unprefixed = all sizes, prefix overrides at breakpoint.
